testcase.name: testRegisterAndRunRestController
testGraphQLQueryAndMutation
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-08T19:08:56.803+05:30 INFO 16640 --- [ main] c.c.c.a.ControllerErrorHandlerAspect : [Controller-Audit] Entering method: WorkflowGraphQLController.executeWorkflow(..) with args: [test-rest-workflow, [VariableInput[key=number, value=30]]] 2026-06-08T19:08:56.803+05:30 INFO 16640 --- [ main] c.c.w.c.WorkflowGraphQLController : [GraphQL] Resolving mutation executeWorkflow for workflow: test-rest-workflow 2026-06-08T19:08:56.808+05:30 INFO 16640 --- [ main] c.c.c.a.ControllerErrorHandlerAspect : [Controller-Audit] Exiting method: WorkflowGraphQLController.executeWorkflow(..) successfully. testcase.name: testGetAndPatchExecutionRestController
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-08T19:08:56.989+05:30 INFO 16640 --- [ main] c.c.c.a.ControllerErrorHandlerAspect : [Controller-Audit] Entering method: WorkflowRestController.getExecutionState(..) with args: [155e3c3b-6f97-40e7-8969-e01ac9815cc3] 2026-06-08T19:08:56.989+05:30 INFO 16640 --- [ main] c.c.w.controller.WorkflowRestController : [REST-API] Fetching state for execution: 155e3c3b-6f97-40e7-8969-e01ac9815cc3 2026-06-08T19:08:56.991+05:30 INFO 16640 --- [ main] c.c.c.a.ControllerErrorHandlerAspect : [Controller-Audit] Exiting method: WorkflowRestController.getExecutionState(..) successfully.
